channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Metric @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-06-23 02:00 — Metric at The Masonic. The lineup featuring Metric, Broken Social Scene, and Stars promises a rich blend of indie and alt-rock with significant buzz.

item.title: Madison Beer @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-06-24 02:30 — Madison Beer at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Madison Beer is gaining traction in the pop scene, and her tour is highly anticipated.

item.title: RUSH @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-16 02:30 → 2026-10-18 02:30 — RUSH at SAP Center at San Jose. RUSH's legacy continues to attract fans, making their tour a significant event.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise has a strong reputation for energetic and engaging live shows.

item.title: Tedeschi Trucks Band @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:00 — Tedeschi Trucks Band at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Tedeschi Trucks Band offers a unique blend of blues and rock, appealing to a diverse audience.

item.title: The Neighbourhood @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:30 — The Neighbourhood at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Neighbourhood's tour is generating excitement, especially with their new music.

item.title: Cristian Castro @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-09-27 03:00 — Cristian Castro at San Jose Civic. AC/DC's tour is a major event for rock fans, promising a high-energy experience.

item.title: Lionel Richie @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-08-07 02:30 — Lionel Richie at Chase Center. Lionel Richie and Earth, Wind & Fire are iconic acts that draw nostalgia and a strong fan base.

item.title: Three Days Grace @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-19 03:00 — Three Days Grace at SAP Center at San Jose. Three Days Grace continues to resonate with rock fans, making their tour noteworthy.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 → 2026-10-02 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's tour is a beloved event for fans of laid-back acoustic music.

item.title: Screeching Weasel @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-09-02 03:00 — Screeching Weasel at August Hall. The Black Crowes and Whiskey Myers promise a night of rock and country fusion.

item.title: J. Cole @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-30 03:00 — J. Cole at Oakland Arena. J. Cole's tour is highly anticipated, showcasing his strong reputation in hip-hop.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Forrest Frank's tour is gaining traction, appealing to fans of modern pop.

item.title: Dillstradamus @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-06-27 03:00 — Dillstradamus at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Dillstradamus promises an exciting electronic experience with a strong following.

item.title: Bilmuri @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-10-05 02:00 — Bilmuri at The Masonic. A$AP Rocky's tour is generating buzz and excitement in the hip-hop community.

item.title: The Breeders @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-08-23 03:00 — The Breeders at The Castro Theatre. The Breeders are a staple in the indie scene, and their shows are always a nostalgic treat.

item.title: Olivia Dean @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-07-12 03:00 — Olivia Dean at Chase Center. Poppy's tour is generating interest with her unique blend of pop and alternative styles.
